disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No central features — no sudden severe headache, no limb weakness/numbness, no slurred speech, no double vision, no difficulty walking beyond the nausea
trigger_question_examples: Any sudden severe headache, weakness or numbness on one side, slurred speech, or double vision?
Can you talk and see normally, and is it purely the nausea/dizziness?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No headache, no weakness or numbness, my speech and vision are normal — it's just the spinning and vomiting.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Clear kinetic trigger (rough boat), habitual motion sensitivity; symptoms provoked by head movement — visual-vestibular mismatch pattern
trigger_question_examples: Did this start on the boat and does it get worse when you move your head?
Do you usually get carsick or seasick?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, it started on the rough boat, it's worse when I move my head, and I usually get seasick.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Dehydration risk — unable to keep fluids down for hours, living alone; monitor urine output/lightheadedness
trigger_question_examples: Have you kept any fluids down, and are you passing urine normally?
Any marked lightheadedness or reduced urine?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't keep anything down and I haven't passed much urine; I feel lightheaded.
